mapper.select: /* crdtLoanMapper.getOrgnInfo */ SELECT A.ORGN_ID , A.ORGN_NM , A.TYPE_CD /* 조직유형코드 */ , A.TYPE_DTL_CD /* 조직유형상세 */ , A.OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_YN /* 개통여신여부 */ , A.OPEN_CRDT_LOAN_STRT_DT /* 개통여신시작일자 */ , A.ORGN_LVL_CD /* 조직레벨코드 */ FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A WHERE A.ORGN_ID = #{ORGN_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.APPL_STRT_DT AND A.APPL_CMPLT_DT

/* crdtLoanMapper.getCrdtLoanBal */ SELECT NVL(SUM(NVL(A.CRDT_LOAN_BAL, 0)), 0) AS CRDT_LOAN_BAL FROM CLS_AGNCY_CRDT_LOAN_INFO A WHERE A.ORGN_ID = #{ORGN_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CRDT_LOAN_TYPE_CD = '10' /* 2014-10-13, 물류 매출발생시 담보여신만 사용하므로 여신구분 추가 */

/* crdtLoanMapper.getCrdtLoanRvlTrgtCntrList */
SELECT 'R' AS CRDT_LOAN_TSK , '20' AS TSK_TP , NVL(E.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, A.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS ORGN_ID , DECODE(NVL(B.INST_MNTH_CNT, 0), 0, DECODE(NVL(F.MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0), 0, B.DVC_OFW_AMNT * 1.1, F.MODEL_DISCOUNT2), B.DVC_OFW_AMNT * 1.1) AS CRDT_LOAN_AMT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CRDT_LOAN_DT , A.CUSTOMER_ID AS CUST_ID , A.CONTRACT_NUM AS SRVC_CNTR_NUM , B.DVC_OFW_AMNT AS OUT_AMT , NVL(B.INST_ORGIN_AMNT, 0) AS INST_AMT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO B , MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO C , LGS_PRDT_SRL_MST D , MSP_REQUEST E , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO F WHERE A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = #{WORK_DT} AND A.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.EVNT_CD(+) = 'NAC' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND C.APP_END_DATE = ( SELECT MIN(APP_END_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND MODEL_ID = B.MODEL_ID ) AND C.MODEL_ID = D.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND C.INTM_SRL_NO = D.PRDT_SRL_NUM AND C.CONTRACT_NUM = D.SVC_CT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = E.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND E.REQUEST_KEY = F.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND F.MODEL_ID(+) IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'U' AS CRDT_LOAN_TSK , '60' AS TSK_TP , B.ORGN_ID , B.CRDT_LOAN_RVL_AMT AS CRDT_LOAN_AMT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CRDT_LOAN_DT , B.CUST_ID , B.SRVC_CNTR_NUM , B.OUT_AMT AS OUT_AMT , CASE WHEN B.INST_AMT < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.INST_AMT END AS INST_AMT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , CLS_CRDT_LOAN_RVL_HST B WHERE A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND A.SUB_STATUS_DATE LIKE #{WORK_DT} || '%' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 AND A.OPEN_AGNT_CD = B.ORGN_ID AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.SRVC_CNTR_NUM AND B.CRDT_LOAN_RVL_TYPE = '20'

/* crdtLoanMapper.getEndCrdtAgncyLoanDtlList */ SELECT A.ORGN_ID , A.CRDT_LOAN_TYPE_CD , A.CRDT_LOAN_SCTN_CD , SUM(NVL(A.CRDT_LOAN_STUP_AMT, 0)) AS CRDT_LOAN_STUP_AMT /*여신설정금액*/ FROM CLS_AGNCY_CRDT_LOAN_DTL A WHERE A.CRDT_LOAN_END_DT = NVL(#{WORK_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD')) GROUP BY A.ORGN_ID, A.CRDT_LOAN_TYPE_CD, A.CRDT_LOAN_SCTN_CD

/* crdtLoanMapper.getCrdtLoanRvlUsimPymList */ SELECT 'R' AS CRDT_LOAN_TSK , '21' AS TSK_TP , NVL(C.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, B.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS ORGN_ID , A.PYMN_AMNT AS CRDT_LOAN_AMT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CRDT_LOAN_DT , B.CUSTOMER_ID AS CUST_ID , A.CONTRACT_NUM AS SRVC_CNTR_NUM , A.PYMN_AMNT AS OUT_AMT , 0 AS INST_AMT , 'Y' AS CRDT_LOAN_APPL_YN , '2' AS CRDT_LOAN_CL , '1' AS QNTY , 'SYSTEM' AS USER_ID FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , SUM(B.PYMN_AMNT) AS PYMN_AMNT FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , NVL(B.SVC_CNTR_NO, A.SVC_CNTR_NO) AS SVC_CNTR_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST B WHERE A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE LIKE #{WORK_YM} || '%' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.EVNT_CD(+) = 'MCN' GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, NVL(B.SVC_CNTR_NO, A.SVC_CNTR_NO) ) A , CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA B WHERE A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND B.PYMN_CD = 'PYM' AND B.BILL_ITEM_CD = 'MCUSM' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CLS_CRDT_LOAN_RVL_HST WHERE CRDT_LOAN_RVL_TYPE = '21' AND SRVC_CNTR_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM ) GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM ) A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_REQUEST C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM(+)

/* crdtLoanMapper.getOpenRvlList */
SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.CUSTOMER_ID , NVL(F.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, A.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS ORGN_ID , CASE WHEN NVL(B.INST_MNTH_CNT, 0) = 0 THEN CASE WHEN NVL(G.MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) > E.OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 1.1 THEN E.OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 1.1 ELSE NVL(G.MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) END ELSE E.OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 1.1 END AS CRDT_LOAN_AMT , B.MODEL_ID , NVL((SELECT PRDT_SRL_NUM FROM LGS_OPEN_PROC_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND APPL_END_DTTM = '99991231235959'), C.INTM_SRL_NO) AS INTM_SRL_NO , E.OUT_UNIT_PRIC AS OUT_AMT , NVL(B.INST_ORGIN_AMNT, 0) AS INST_AMT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CRDT_LOAN_DT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO B , MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO C , LGS_PRDT_SRL_MST D , CMN_HNDST_AMT E , MSP_REQUEST F , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO G WHERE A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = #{WORK_DT} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.EVNT_CD IN ('NAC','C07', 'UPD') AND B.MODEL_CHN_CD IN ('39','30') AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.EVNT_TRTM_NO = C.EVNT_TRTM_NO AND C.MODEL_TYPE = 'D1' AND C.MODEL_ID = D.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND C.INTM_SRL_NO = D.PRDT_SRL_NUM AND C.MODEL_ID = E.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE || '000000' BETWEEN E.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM AND E.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = F.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND F.REQUEST_KEY = G.REQUEST_KEY(+)

/* crdtLoanMapper.getOpenCnclList */
SELECT B.ORGN_ID , B.CRDT_LOAN_RVL_AMT AS CRDT_LOAN_AMT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CRDT_LOAN_DT , B.CUST_ID , B.SRVC_CNTR_NUM , B.OUT_AMT AS OUT_AMT , CASE WHEN B.INST_AMT < 0 THEN 0 ELSE B.INST_AMT END AS INST_AMT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , CLS_CRDT_LOAN_RVL_HST B WHERE A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND A.SUB_STATUS_DATE LIKE #{WORK_DT} || '%' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 AND A.OPEN_AGNT_CD = B.ORGN_ID AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.SRVC_CNTR_NUM AND B.CRDT_LOAN_RVL_TYPE = '20' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND MODEL_ID = B.MODEL_ID AND INTM_SRL_NO = B.INTM_SRL_NO )

/* crdtLoanMapper.getDvcChgRvlList */
SELECT 'Y' AS CRDT_LOAN_APPL_YN , 'R' AS CRDT_LOAN_TSK , '22' AS TSK_TP , '2' AS CRDT_LOAN_CL , NVL(A.AGNT_CD, C.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID) AS ORGN_ID , CASE WHEN NVL(F.INST_MNTH_CNT, 0) = 0 THEN CASE WHEN NVL(D.MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) > B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 1.1 THEN B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 1.1 ELSE NVL(D.MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) END ELSE B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 1.1 END AS CRDT_LOAN_AMT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CRDT_LOAN_DT , E.CUSTOMER_ID AS CUST_ID , A.CONTRACT_NUM AS SRVC_CNTR_NUM , '1' AS QNTY , B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC AS OUT_AMT , NVL(F.INST_ORGIN_AMNT, 0) AS INST_AMT , A.MODEL_ID , A.INTM_SRL_NO , A.EVNT_TRTM_NO FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST A , CMN_HNDST_AMT B , MSP_REQUEST C , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO D , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO E , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO F WHERE A.APPL_STRT_DTTM LIKE #{WORK_DT} || '%' AND APPL_END_DTTM LIKE '99991231%' AND A.MODEL_CHN_CD = '01' AND A.MODEL_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND A.APPL_STRT_DTTM BETWEEN B.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM AND B.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = E.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = F.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.EVNT_TRTM_NO = F.EVNT_TRTM_NO

/* crdtLoanMapper.getDvcChgCnclList */
SELECT 'Y' AS CRDT_LOAN_APPL_YN , 'U' AS CRDT_LOAN_TSK , '61' AS TSK_TP , '2' AS CRDT_LOAN_CL , B.ORGN_ID , B.CRDT_LOAN_RVL_AMT AS CRDT_LOAN_AMT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CRDT_LOAN_DT , B.CUST_ID , B.SRVC_CNTR_NUM , '1' AS QNTY , B.OUT_AMT , B.INST_AMT FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST A , CLS_CRDT_LOAN_RVL_HST B WHERE A.APPL_END_DTTM LIKE #{WORK_DT} || '%' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.APPL_END_DTTM, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.APPL_STRT_DTTM, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.SRVC_CNTR_NUM AND A.MODEL_ID = B.MODEL_ID AND A.INTM_SRL_NO = B.INTM_SRL_NO AND B.CRDT_LOAN_RVL_TYPE = '22'
